sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tu ni-in ah tua gam nuam ke’n ka ngaihsun hi,
Ni tum ciangin ah ka tung ding hi
Heh
pih na tawh Honpa kiang ka din’ ciangin ah
Ka lu tang aksi taang a om
diam?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka lu tung aksi taang, aksi taang a om diam?
Ni tak a ni a tum ciang-in-ah
(ciang-in-ah)
Tawl dam na inn sung ah ka khan lawh cianginah
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam (a om
diam)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa hatna sungah na seemin thungen ding
Ka ngah mi bang kei hong hi sak
in,
Min than’ ni’n aksi taang kei aa ding hi kha ding
A mah phatna tui hual bang om
ciang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A ma mai ka et ciang bangzahin lungdam ding,
A khe phung ah suangmanpha koih
ding
Kham khuapi sungah lungdamna hong khang sak ding,
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam?
